\"Seven Kingdoms, now five. The broken a: "Seven Kingdoms, now five. The broken alliance."
DUSCLOPS: That is correct... Everthing i: DUSCLOPS: That is correct... Everthing is correct. You have earned the right of passage.

DUSKULL: Lost souls cannot be found. The: DUSKULL: Lost souls cannot be found. The fire that fuels us keep burning.

\"0044 | The day of reckoning is upon us: "0044 | The day of reckoning is upon us. Griselda has become a menace.
Our allies have turned against us. We've: Our allies have turned against us. We've gone out of line.
Their march rings in our ears. This is t: Their march rings in our ears. This is the end, this is the end."
\"6677 | We, the Ghovora Kingdom, have u: "6677 | We, the Ghovora Kingdom, have united with the Kasura, Xervah, and Yvven Kingdoms to ensure our survival.
But Griselda got close with the King of: But Griselda got close with the King of the Zigara Kingdom, Ieisel.
Ieisel, known for his proficiency in bla: Ieisel, known for his proficiency in black magic... Will he provide for us?"
\"3645 | Griselda's sisters, Spacea and: "3645 | Griselda's sisters, Spacea and Tiempa have gathered in the court.
Griselda has become obsessed with Ieisel: Griselda has become obsessed with Ieisel's inventions.
Her sisters pleaded with her. Do not bec: Her sisters pleaded with her. Do not become consumed by its power.
For soon the power itself will have cont: For soon the power itself will have control. Kingdoms shall fall."
\"7171 | Griselda locked us away. We ref: "7171 | Griselda locked us away.  We refused to help her fight.
She killed one of the Kingdom's leaders. The Seven Kingdoms are now only five.
She broke the alliance. What have we don: She broke the alliance. What have we done? What have we done?"
DUSKULL: This room was changed by an out: DUSKULL: This room was changed by an outsider. A trial awaits.
This bubble is surging with energy! It l: This bubble is surging with energy! It looks like something is trying to escape.
Do you want to burst the bubble?: Do you want to burst the bubble?

\"9043 | Following the fall of Ieisel, G: "9043 | Following the fall of Ieisel, Griselda made us recreate his creation.
But we weren't skilled enough. Failure f: But we weren't skilled enough. Failure followed, and so did..."
The bubble is almost about to burst! Jus: The bubble is almost about to burst! Just one more hit!
For you to come this far... How did you: For you to come this far... How did you even get through the doors?
No, this isn't the time... Please, get r: No, this isn't the time... Please, get ready.
???: Yarrghh! That was a nice sleep.
Reborn yet again, I have been. Dufaux is: Reborn yet again, I have been. Dufaux is my name!
And may I say that it was so much easier: And may I say that it was so much easier to free myself than I thought it would be?
Flaunting a rare species of Pokémon as b: Flaunting a rare species of Pokémon as bait was an ingenious plan, yarhaha!
DUFAUX: Why so silent, Narcissa? I thoug: DUFAUX: Why so silent, Narcissa? I thought you'd be happy to see me?
How long has it been since our last enco: How long has it been since our last encounter? 20? 30? 40 years?
Yes! Something along those lines, yes?: Yes! Something along those lines, yes?
NARCISSA: \\PN, I'm going to need your h: NARCISSA: \PN, I'm going to need your help destroying this abomination.
I don't know if we can do it, but we can: I don't know if we can do it, but we can't let him leave this tower!
DUFAUX: Destroy me? Weren't you at your: DUFAUX: Destroy me? Weren't you at your strongest when you had your old Chandelure?
Yes that's right, the Chandelure that in: Yes that's right, the Chandelure that incidentally, I took down myself.
NARCISSA: Gh... \\| It doesn't matter if: NARCISSA: Gh... \| It doesn't matter if I don't have my old Chandelure.
My new Pokémon are perfectly capable of: My new Pokémon are perfectly capable of defeating you!
DUFUAX: ...Perhaps with help, it is poss: DUFUAX: ...Perhaps with help, it is possible. Especially in my current state.
Ah! Then I've decided that I shall take: Ah! Then I've decided that I shall take my leave! But we shall see each other again very soon, I'm sure!
NARCISSA: I know you can't be held compl: NARCISSA: I know you can't be held completely accountable for this.
But, oh dear, you really do not know whe: But, oh dear, you really do not know when to leave things alone. You should really put that chalice back.
Not that you will be able to even take i: Not that you will be able to even take it outside the tower, mind you.
The accursed thing will just vanish and: The accursed thing will just vanish and reappear here, if you try, spilling poison on your belongings in the process.
However, what's done is done, and since: However, what's done is done, and since you're part of the cause, we're going to have to work together.
Long ago, soon after the Calamity fell u: Long ago, soon after the Calamity fell upon this region, Dufaux appeared in what was known as Goldenleaf Village.
He ravaged through everything. My Chande: He ravaged through everything. My Chandelure and I were able to stop him, but...
My Chandelure was terminally injured. I: My Chandelure was terminally injured. I buried it at Amethyst Cave, where I first found it.
Even though I could stop him, I wasn't s: Even though I could stop him, I wasn't strong enough to completely destroy him.
So I trapped Dufaux in a bubble of energ: So I trapped Dufaux in a bubble of energy on the top floor of this abandoned tower...
And created the trial you've gone throug: And created the trial you've gone through to keep out anyone from trying to enter.
Truth be told, this event was inevitable: Truth be told, this event was inevitable. That bubble I created couldn't hold him back forever.
It was only a matter of time before Dufa: It was only a matter of time before Dufaux became strong enough to escape.
But until I've found and destroyed him,: But until I've found and destroyed him, finally, I cannot stay put in Goldenleaf Town.
As a result, I hereby temporarily resign: As a result, I hereby temporarily resign until this mission is complete.
Please be careful, \\PN. I hope things w: Please be careful, \PN. I hope things will be able to be resolved quickly.
???: The final meeting between my sister: ???: The final meeting between my sisters and I.
The end of a legacy. The end of a family: The end of a legacy. The end of a family. All within one moment.
I shall allow you to see what I saw. You: I shall allow you to see what I saw. You shall share my burden.
So perfect, so incomprehensible... So be: So perfect, so incomprehensible... So beautiful~...
My beautiful crests... Oh, how I adore y: My beautiful crests... Oh, how I adore your power...!
SPACEA: I hope you're aware of what you': SPACEA: I hope you're aware of what you've done, Griselda.
GRISELDA: What have I done, Spacea? Plea: GRISELDA: What have I done, Spacea? Please, enlighten me.
TIEMPA: You went against the alliance! E: TIEMPA: You went against the alliance! Everything we've worked so hard to attain!
Who gave you the right to attack the Kas: Who gave you the right to attack the Kasura Kingdom?!
GRISELDA: Oh, but don't you understand?: GRISELDA: Oh, but don't you understand? The only reason we joined that alliance was for protection.
But now there's no need for such formali: But now there's no need for such formalities.  Because of King Ieisel, I've gotten my hands on Crests.
Their power makes my army absolutely uns: Their power makes my army absolutely unstoppable.
TIEMPA: But why?! We've already taken ca: TIEMPA: But why?! We've already taken care of the one who threatened all of us. There's no reason to fight.
GRISELDA: You know why they fought, corr: GRISELDA: You know why they fought, correct? They wanted\c[6] the Archetype's power!
And now that they're gone, who's going t: And now that they're gone, who's going to be next?!
Greed lives in the hearts of all humans!: Greed lives in the hearts of all humans! It consumes each and every one of us.
Kasumi ruled her Kingdom as if she did n: Kasumi ruled her Kingdom as if she did not want to fight, but deep down she held lust for the Archetype too.
If true peace is to be attained, then it: If true peace is to be attained, then it must be through me!
GRISELDA: What do you mean \"we\"?! Have: GRISELDA: What do you mean "we"?! Have you both not become rulers of your own kingdoms far from here?
Spacea, Queen of the Kingdom of Space. T: Spacea, Queen of the Kingdom of Space. Tiempa, Queen of the Kingdom of Time.
Two kingdoms that have no part in this w: Two kingdoms that have no part in this war. You have no say in this matter.
TIEMPA: Though it may be true, we still: TIEMPA: Though it may be true, we still reign from Ghovora. This is still our home.
And we will not allow our home to fall b: And we will not allow our home to fall because of your paranoia.
GRISELDA: Then begone! Traitors! Traitor: GRISELDA: Then begone! Traitors! Traitors! All who defy the Queen shall meet the same fate!
SPACEA: We are not traitors to the crown: SPACEA: We are not traitors to the crown. We have not defied you.
GRISELDA: Then what have you done but wa: GRISELDA: Then what have you done but waste my time?
I will not stop until this region is min: I will not stop until this region is mine. Only THEN will peace truly exist.
TIEMPA: I think we've heard enough.
GRISELDA: Then leave... And don't return: GRISELDA: Then leave... And don't return until you've had a change of heart.
SPACEA: She's left us no choice. We're g: SPACEA: She's left us no choice. We're going to have to go through with it.
TIEMPA: She won't listen to reason. It's: TIEMPA: She won't listen to reason. It's what has to be done.
SPECTOR: Fancy meeting you here again, \: SPECTOR: Fancy meeting you here again, \PN. Are you interested in the castle's secrets too?
People used to say that they felt a stro: People used to say that they felt a strong evil presence whenever they walked within this castle.
While I can definitely say that somethin: While I can definitely say that something evil did in fact reside here... It seems to have gone away.
Is that a good thing, or a bad thing? I: Is that a good thing, or a bad thing? I wonder...
Can you feel it? That presence?: Can you feel it? That presence?
It's definitely a malicious one, but... it's sort of sad too?
I can't really explain it, but it reside: I can't really explain it, but it resides at the top of the tower.
Actually, Narcissa told me not to come h: Actually, Narcissa told me not to come here. It's unfortunate that my curiosity is too strong for my own liking.
Anyway, I think I'm going to head to Nar: Anyway, I think I'm going to head to Narcissa's Gym now. I want to explore it for myself.
Even here it seems that the spirits are: Even here it seems that the spirits are roused by my presence.
Ah, but there apparently used to be some: Ah, but there apparently used to be something much stronger here that dwarfed the wisps in comparison.
Is that a good thing, or a bad thing?: Is that a good thing, or a bad thing?
Nonetheless, I wish I could've felt that: Nonetheless, I wish I could've felt that energy while it was still present for myself.
Though more importantly... Can you feel: Though more importantly... Can you feel it? That presence?
The wisps are nothing compared to what's: The wisps are nothing compared to what's locked further into this place.
It's definitely a malicious presence... Perhaps a bit sad as well. \|Odd.
Ahah... The more I explore the Goldenlea: Ahah... The more I explore the Goldenleaf region, the more intriguing it becomes.
Y'know... Narcissa told me not to come h: Y'know... Narcissa told me not to come here.
Bit of a shame to let such an interestin: Bit of a shame to let such an interesting place to go unexplored though, no?
Especially when such a place is absolute: Especially when such a place is absolutely teeming with spirits.
Forgotten kingdoms, wisps of the dead...
Truly, the Goldenleaf Region is all I co: Truly, the Goldenleaf Region is all I could've hoped for and more.
Ah, but now I wonder what Narcissa's gym: Ah, but now I wonder what Narcissa's gym is like.
From what I've heard, it's just as haunt: From what I've heard, it's just as haunted as the rest of this area.
The spirits residing there are calling a: The spirits residing there are calling and beckoning to me...
A golden chalice is lying on the ground,: A golden chalice is lying on the ground, with a strange purple liquid spilling from it.
The chalice is made of solid gold and ha: The chalice is made of solid gold and has rubies inlayed into it. Certainly valuable.
There is a coat of dust layered on it. S: There is a coat of dust layered on it. Seems like it has been here for quite some time.
Something is odd about this chalice, bet: Something is odd about this chalice, better to leave it alone.
The liquid smells like wine. Some of it: The liquid smells like wine. Some of it is dripping from the chalice, as if it was only spilled a second ago.
As you reach out to touch it, you notice: As you reach out to touch it, you notice it... moving?
As soon as you touch it, some of the liq: As soon as you touch it, some of the liquid outright leaps onto your hand! You manage to shake it off but you feel a bit woozy.
Unpleasant, but you did learn something: Unpleasant, but you did learn something about this apparently living liquid. Worth it?
However, when is this ever going to come: However, when is this ever going to come up again?
You really should have known better.
Yeah that seems like a bad idea.
The liquid leaps up at you!: The liquid leaps up at you!
